name_en: 🆕 Chip Version Top-tier Original M12219 This Monogram canvas passport cover features a lively print depicting the brand mascot Vivienne boating in tropical waters, adding fun to travel. The lively grainy leather lining is stylish. A worthy gift choice. 10 x 14 x 2.5 cm (Length x Height x Width)
